input.prompt: Draw a radial-hub fgraph: center = Lyra hub, satellites = Telegram adapter, Discord adapter, voiceCLI, roxabi-vault, imageCLI. Label each edge with the protocol (http, websocket, mqtt, ipc).

notes: fgraph radial-hub template with 5 satellites and labeled bidirectional edges. Exercises the inline fgraph-base.css Mode A distribution (single-file output).
